comment: Banff standard block (type_id=32) with an EMPTY tx list. Generated from Go vms/platformvm/block.NewBanffStandardBlock(time.Unix(1700000000,0), parent, height, nil) via the platformvm block Codec (CodecVersion=0). Field order is byte-exact: time (u64 BE), then the embedded ApricotStandardBlock = CommonBlock{parent,height} + Transactions(empty Vec<Tx> -> u32 count 0). parent = bytes [1..=32], height = 0x0102030405060708, time = 1700000000. id = sha256(bytes). See M4.5.
